title: Astrocyte morphology assessment in astrocyte-neuron co-cultures
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2uhdf","text":"This protocol outlines the process for analyzing astrocyte morphology in astrocyte-neuron co-cultures using immunostaining and Sholl analysis. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"bsv7d","text":"Maintain sterility and avoid contamination during all steps.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eo2q6","text":"Follow institutional guidelines for the disposal of biological and chemical waste.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"9gung","text":"DPBS (GIBCO, Cat# 14190144) ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ee8bc","text":"normal goat serum (NGS; Thermo Fisher, Cat# 01-6201) ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5r9rj","text":"Triton X-100 Surfact-Amps Detergent Solution (Thermo Fisher, Cat# 28314)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"atrqs","text":"VECTASHIELD Antifade Mounting Medium with DAPI (Vector Laboratories, Cat# H-1200-10)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bv0lm","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9tdvr","text":"Antibodies","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e8j3g","text":"chicken anti-GFP (1:1,000 dilution; Aves Labs, Cat# GFP-1020, RRID:AB_10000240) ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"24r2l","text":"rabbit anti-GFAP (1:2,000 dilution; Agilent, Cat# Z0334, RRID:AB_10013382) ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9rtui","text":"Alexa Fluor 488 goat anti-chicken IgY(H+L) (1:1,000 dilution; Thermo Fisher, Cat# A-11039, RRID:AB_2534096)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"89abk","text":"Alexa Fluor 594 goat anti-rabbit IgG(H+L) (1:1,000 dilution; Thermo Fisher, Cat# A-11037, RRID:AB_2534095)  ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Block coverslips in a blocking buffer containing 50% normal goat serum (NGS) and 0.4% Triton X-100 for 00:30:00 at Room temperature .
Incubate samples Overnight at 4 °C in primary antibodies diluted in blocking buffer containing 10% NGS. Validate antibody specificity and optimize staining conditions for reproducibility.
Incubate coverslips in Alexa Fluor conjugated secondary antibodies for 02:00:00 at Room temperature .
Remove secondary antibody and wash coverslips three times with DPBS.
Mount coverslips onto glass slides using Vectashield mounting media containing DAPI.
Image coverslips using a Keyence BZ-X800 microscope at 40x magnification in red, green, and/or DAPI channels using a CCD camera.

Analyze astrocyte morphological complexity using FIJI with the Sholl analysis plugin (https://github.com/Eroglu-Lab/In-Vitro-Sholl). Ensure analysis is performed on healthy astrocytes with strong expression of fluorescent markers and single, non-overlapping nuclei (DAPI stain).
Conduct statistical analyses using custom code in R (https://github.com/Eroglu-Lab/In-Vitro-Sholl).
Use a mixed-effect model with Tukey post-test for Sholl analysis to evaluate differences between experimental conditions, treating variability per experiment as a random effect.
Verify the health of astrocyte-neuron co-cultures by ensuring the peak number of astrocyte intersections is ≥ 25 in the control condition.
Document the exact number of independent experiments and cells analyzed in the figure legend for each experiment.
Fix astrocyte-neuron co-cultures on glass coverslips on Day in Vitro 12 (DIV 12) with warm 4% paraformaldehyde (PFA) for 00:07:00 at Room temperature .
Remove primary antibody and wash coverslips three times with DPBS.
creator: Sarah van Veen
